title: Embedding-Space Cross-Table Predictability on rel-stack: Third Dataset for Revised Regime Theory
summary: Demo notebook for the embedding-space cross-table predictability experiment on the rel-stack (Stack Exchange) dataset. Defines Standard and PRMP HeteroSAGEConv architectures, loads pre-computed results, and visualizes training curves, R² trajectories, and task performance. Shows PRMP significantly outperforms Standard on post-votes regression (MAE 0.073 vs 0.564) and user-engagement classification (AUROC 0.767 vs 0.505). Mini data JSON contains raw-feature baselines, per-epoch training metrics, and embedding R² trajectories across all table edges.
